overall.description: First-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, transitioning from under a concrete overpass into a neon-lit downtown street with towering buildings, holographic advertisements, and wet reflective surfaces. The footage exhibits high-quality ray-traced lighting characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under highway overpass

events.description: pedestrian crosses the multi-lane road from right to left in front of approaching vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the concrete overpass, flanked by safety bollards

notable_agents.action: crossing the road from right to left between moving vehicles

entered.detail: massive brutalist concrete highway overpass with geometric support beams creating a covered corridor
short yellow and black striped bollards lining the edge of the sidewalk separating pedestrian walkway from the road
wet asphalt road with multiple lanes for vehicle traffic showing reflections of headlights
metal security fence running along the left side behind the concrete structure

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete highway overpass, creating a sheltered corridor with artificial fluorescent lighting. The camera moves forward along a sidewalk bordered by yellow safety bollards, with a multi-lane road visible to the right where vehicles pass by. A pedestrian crosses the road mid-segment, navigating between the moving traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional zone from overpass to open neon-lit downtown street

events.description: exits the covered overpass into the open urban street with tall buildings and visible sky
ambient lighting shifts from fluorescent to vibrant neon as holographic billboards become visible

agents.ego_description: walking out from under the overpass into the open street, approaching a pedestrian ahead on the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: tall concrete building facade with vertical rows of illuminated windows casting warm light onto the sidewalk
modern glass and steel high-rise tower rising behind the concrete building with reflective surfaces
large glowing digital billboard displaying advertisements with bright cyan and magenta colors
tall street lamps with linear neon lighting illuminating the road and sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from under the overpass into an open downtown street, revealing a dramatic shift to neon-lit urban architecture. Tall buildings flank the street, with a concrete building on the left featuring warm window lights and modern glass towers visible beyond. Large holographic billboards and neon streetlights illuminate the wet pavement as the camera approaches a pedestrian walking ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial corridor with continuous digital signage

events.description: passing a pedestrian with distinctive red hair walking in the opposite direction on the right
large vertical holographic advertisement becomes prominent on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the busy downtown sidewalk, passing other pedestrians and observing the neon storefronts

notable_agents.action: walking past the camera in the opposite direction wearing dark clothing and red headgear

entered.detail: tall vertical holographic projection showing animated advertisements floating above the street
enclosed pedestrian bridge connecting two buildings high above the street with illuminated windows
continuous row of digital screens at street level displaying various advertisements and brand logos

segments.scene_description: Walking through a dense commercial corridor lined with continuous digital advertising panels and towering holographic displays. The street features an overhead pedestrian bridge connecting the high-rise buildings. The camera passes a pedestrian with red hair walking in the opposite direction while maintaining a steady pace along the wet reflective sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon between high-rises with overhead walkways

events.description: passing beneath the overhead walkway bridge as it crosses directly above the street

agents.ego_description: continuing down the narrowing street corridor with towering buildings on both sides, approaching a more open area ahead

entered.detail: another elevated roadway or monorail track visible in the distance crossing above the street

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through a narrower urban canyon with the overhead walkway bridge now closer overhead. The street remains lined with digital signage and illuminated building facades. The camera moves steadily forward as the corridor gradually opens up ahead, with an elevated highway structure becoming visible in the distance against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered concrete underpass into the vibrant, neon-drenched heart of a futuristic downtown district. It begins beneath a massive highway overpass, moving along a sidewalk of yellow safety bollards while vehicles pass on a multi-lane road and a pedestrian crosses the traffic. As the camera emerges from the shadows of the overpass, the environment shifts dramatically into an open street flanked by towering glass skyscrapers and illuminated by holographic billboards reflecting off the wet pavement. The scene then deepens into a dense commercial corridor lined with digital advertising panels and an overhead pedestrian bridge, passing a red-haired pedestrian walking in the opposite direction. Finally, the camera pushes through a narrow urban canyon under the walkway bridge before the corridor opens up to reveal an elevated highway structure against the night sky.
